params.name: Playbook
params.description:
This looks like an ordinary notebook, but it’s actually a 13th-generation secret playbook—packed with real-world tactics to become a love guru. Legend says even skimming a page will make people chase you.
[Excerpts]"They throw themselves at me—what can I do?"
"Flirt with the ex, entertain the current… but save room for the upgrade."
